# `draw.marker`

> **Stability:** stable
> **Since:** 0.3
> **Bucket:** `labels`
> **Wire kind:** `marker`

Draw a single-anchor marker glyph with an optional text label and
numeric value. The renderer projects `anchor` to canvas pixel space
and paints the `text` (if any) at that position using the
{@link TextOpts}-derived font + alignment.

## Anchors

`anchor` — one `WorldPoint`

Anchor count: 1.

## Signature

```ts
function marker(anchor: WorldPoint, opts?: MarkerOpts): DrawingHandle;
```

_The leading `slotId: string` parameter is injected by the chartlang compiler at every callsite — script authors call `draw.marker(...)` without it._

## Example

```ts
import { defineIndicator } from "@invinite-org/chartlang-core";
    export default defineIndicator({
        name: "draw.marker demo",
        apiVersion: 1,
        compute({ bar, draw }) {
            draw.marker(
                { time: bar.time, price: bar.close },
                { text: "B", size: "large", color: "#10b981" },
            );
        },
    });
```
